bio: I am an RPA Software Developer with experience in process automation, working from requirements gathering and AS-IS process mapping to solution implementation and supporting deployment in production environments.

I work with platforms such as UiPath and Power Automate, as well as using languages like Python, C#, and VB.NET for integrations and customizations when needed. I am interested in transforming repetitive and inefficient processes into more structured and reliable digital solutions.

Throughout my experience, I have participated in the automation of several processes across finance, logistics, HR, and back-office areas, contributing to productivity gains and reduced operational errors.

certifications.name: UiPath Certified Professional Automation Developer Professional Certification
